events.label: reasoning
events.text: We need answer JSON only. Scenario: field condition for Confined space compared with referenced drawing or manufacturer sheet. Tags, ratings, layout callouts line up with installed work, revision block current. Reference material OSHA 1910.146. Stage tested/inspected. Need evaluate. It seems compliant, pass. Need fill fields. decision pass. risk low. work_stage tested/inspected. component_conditions empty. percent_complete maybe 90? value 0. sound_source empty? The schema says sound source when asked; not asked, can use empty string. confidence 0.95. event_time 0, rate 0, order empty, workable empty. findings empty. actions maybe none. rationale brief. references OSHA 1910.146. Need ensure valid JSON. No prose outside.
